allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'feat: multi-agent chat UI with markdown, tables, and charts' --body ' *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add CSV Finder agent — searches MinIO, injects CSV data into LLM context *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: smart CSV filtering — match rows by query keywords instead of first-N only *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: CSV Finder 2-step ReAct — AI scans headers then decides columns+filter *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: Research Agent thinks in Python pandas code *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add Code Agent — writes Python pandas code as dedicated pipeline step *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: filter CSV files by filename relevance before fetching content *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: AI infers domain from folder+filename to pick relevant CSV files *)
Bash(git commit -m 'revert: remove all CSV Finder features, restore pre-CSV-Finder state *)
Bash(git commit -m 'refactor: extract agent UI into separate components *)
Bash(git commit -m 'refactor: separate tool components into app/component/tool/ *)
